vmrseq 0.99.1
  • Reference
  • Articles
    • Analyzing single-cell bisulfite sequencing data with vmrseq

Coerce a NA-dropped HDF5 matrix back to regular matrix form where NAs are not dropped to 0.

Source: R/HDF5NAdrop2matrix.R
HDF5NAdrop2matrix.Rd

Coerce a NA-dropped HDF5 matrix back to regular matrix form where NAs are not dropped to 0.

HDF5NAdrop2matrix(hdf5_assay)

Arguments

hdf5_assay

an DelayedMatrix object with dropped NA values (e.g. an assay from HDF5SummarizedExpriment object saved by vmrseq::data.pool)

Value

Returns a matrix.

Examples

# load example data
toy.se <- HDF5Array::loadHDF5SummarizedExperiment(system.file("extdata", "toy", package = "vmrseq"))

# run the function
HDF5NAdrop2matrix(SummarizedExperiment::assays(toy.se)$M_mat)
